items.notes: Versions are representative based on typical Cisco Nexus release cadence and published EOL announcements; always verify against official Cisco documentation and support matrices for your specific model and feature set.

Version numbers follow the Cisco IOS XE train convention (e.g., 17.12.x). Recommended is a prior, stable release before latest; verify against the specific hardware model and CCO/SWAN for advisories and compatibility. EOL list reflects versions past official support per published Cisco End-of-Life policy.
Latest recommended version for Cisco 9800-WLC is 17.12.0. Earlier 17.9.x–17.11.x releases are EOL. Confirm EOL dates and feature support on Cisco.com Product Security and Software Center.
Version numbers reflect Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS releases as of mid-2024. Confirm against the official PAN-OS Lifecycle page for the most current status and exact build numbers.
